top_signals.title: Rubio stresses US commitment to Asia at ASEAN meeting
Let the machines do the grunt work, so that we can do the great work
top_signals.summary: AI is spectacular at the boring, mundane, repetitive grunt work, data entry, first-pass research, formatting, scheduling and summarising. It can execute those tasks faster and, frankly, better than most of us. Good. Let it. Because the moment you free a talented person from grunt work, they do what machines cannot: build relationships, exercise judgment, tell [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
